nasb.text: Yet hear the word of the Lord, O Zedekiah king of Judah! Thus says the Lord concerning you, ‘You will not die by the sword.

esv.text: Yet hear the word of the Lord, O Zedekiah king of Judah! Thus says the Lord concerning you: ‘You shall not die by the sword.

cnv.text: 但猶大王西底家啊，你還要聽耶和華的話！耶和華論到你這樣說：‘你必不會死在刀下；

ccb.text: 犹大王西底迦啊！你要听耶和华的话。论到你，耶和华说，你必不会死在刀剑之下，
